findings.description: Missing image replaced by a black placeholder
findings.evidence: In the PDF, there is a complex 'NC' logo with a tree and text for 'Waste Management'. In the HTML, this is rendered as a solid black square.

findings.description: Loss of column layout in the signature section
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'DATE' is on the left, while 'SIGNATURE', 'PRINTED NAME', etc., form a separate column block on the right. In the HTML, all these fields are stacked vertically in a single column.

findings.description: Loss of bold formatting on the main title
findings.evidence: The top heading 'DRY-CLEANING SOLVENT CLEANUP ACT (DSCA)' is bold in the PDF but rendered with normal font weight in the HTML.
